basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Raipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 92 Faculty Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Raipur (AIIMS Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: Candidates must possess MBBS with MD/MS/DM/MCh/DNB qualifications for medical faculty posts or MSc (Medical) with PhD for non-medical disciplines, along with relevant teaching, research, and clinical experience ranging from 3 to 14 years depending on the post. The prescribed age limit is up to 58 years for Professor/Additional Professor and up to 50 years for Associate/Assistant Professor, with applicable age relaxation as per government norms.

age_limit.details: Professor/Additional Professor: Not exceeding 58 years. Associate Professor/Assistant Professor: Not exceeding 50 years. Age relaxation applicable.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS + MD/MS/DM/MCh/DNB as applicable to specialty, MSc (Medical) + PhD
qualification.details: Professor: MBBS + MD/MS/DM/MCh + 14 years experience after PG/super-specialty Additional Professor: MBBS + MD/MS/DM/MCh + 10 years experience after PG/super-specialty Associate Professor: MBBS + MD/MS/DM/MCh + 6 years experience after PG/super-specialty Assistant Professor: MBBS + MD/MS/DM/MCh + 3 years experience after PG/super-specialty

salary_details.details: Professor: Level 14A (₹1,68,900 – 2,20,400) Additional Professor: Level 13A2 (₹1,48,200 – 2,11,400) Associate Professor: Level 13A1 (₹1,38,300 – 2,09,200) Assistant Professor: Level 12 (₹1,01,500 – 1,67,400)

selection_process: category Interview by Standing Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Raipur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Raipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Faculty Posts at AIIMS Raipur?
faq.answer: AIIMS Raipur has announced a total of 92 vacancies for various Faculty Posts. This includes positions like Professor, Additional Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Raipur Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the AIIMS Raipur Faculty Posts is 15th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification is typically an MBBS degree along with MD/MS/DM/MCh/DNB as applicable to the specialty. For non-medical faculty, MSc (Medical) + PhD is required, along with relevant teaching or research experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Faculty positions?
faq.answer: For Professor and Additional Professor posts, the age limit is not exceeding 58 years. For Associate Professor and Assistant Professor posts, the age limit is not exceeding 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for AIIMS Raipur Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. General/OBC candidates need to pay ₹3,000, while SC/ST candidates need to pay ₹2,400. Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications, experience, and category. This is followed by an interview conducted by the Standing Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Faculty positions at AIIMS Raipur?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Level 12 (₹1,01,500 – 1,67,400) for Assistant Professors to Level 14A (₹1,68,900 – 2,20,400) for Professors, per month, as per the 7th Central Pay Commission.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Chhattisgarh apply for these posts?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment is open to eligible candidates from across India. AIIMS Raipur is a central government institution, and applications are accepted from all eligible individuals.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is applicable for candidates belonging to reserved categories (SC/ST/OBC) and other special categories as per the government norms and the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are available on the AIIMS Raipur official website. You can also find direct links in the "Important Links" section of this article.
